examples: The various parts of The Falkirk Wheel were all constructed and assembled, like one giant toy building set, at Butterley Engineering's Steelworks in Derbyshire, some 400 km from Falkirk.
A small part of Derbyshire is all the present concern.
There is not a finer county in England than Derbyshire.
Victims were found throughout Yorkshire and across other counties including Essex, Derbyshire, Staffordshire and Nottinghamshire.
Derbyshire was held by Labour from 1981 until 2009 when it lost control to the Conservatives.
